return(function(T,D,C,X,L,Q,s,Z,l,r,d,Y,u,n,M,R,N,k,S,E,g,x,J,q,c)k,S,d,R,x,r,N,q,Y,g,u,c,J,n,E,Z,l,M=function(T)local z,c=290486-290485,T[648191-648190]while c do end end end end end end end c=#L return D(s)end,function(T,z)local D=Y(z)local C=function()return c(T,{},z,D)end return C end,function(T,z)local D=Y(z)local C=function(C,X,L,Q,s,g)return c(T,{C,X,L,Q;s;g},z,D)end return C end,function(T,z)local D=Y(z)local C=function(C,X,L)return c(T,{C;X;L},z,D)end return C end,921413+-921413,function(T)x[T]=x[T]-(-16573-(-16574))if-847548-(-847548)==x[T]then x[T],g[T]=nil,nil end end,function()Z=(-100815+100816)+Z x[Z]=34518+-34517 return Z end return(u(1879691-666116,{}))(D(s))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[z(-945774-(-972955))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
